provenance.rationale: Initial joint sweep over the combined anime + enterprise KR fixtures (Phase 10, study rag-joint-v1). Search space spans cheap retrieval knobs (rag_top_k, rag_candidate_k, rag_use_mmr / rag_mmr_lambda), the reranker on/off + batch axis, the query-parser tier (off / regex / llm) with its multi-query RRF constant, and agent-loop budgets (agent_loop, agent_max_iter, agent_min_stop_conf). TPE with n_startup_trials=8 to seed broad coverage on an 11-dim mixed space; NopPruner because each trial is a single end-to-end eval call (no per-step learning curve to prune on). Primary metric is mean_recall_at_k on the combined dataset; per-domain recall_at_k_anime / recall_at_k_enterprise are tracked as secondaries so later rounds can spot domain regressions before any narrow. provenance.kind=initial because no parent bundle exists yet; reviewer.approved_at=null leaves the gate explicit for human sign-off before round_02 is proposed.

notes: Conditional axes are flat in the schema because next_round_config.schema.json has no native conditional sampling: rag_rerank_batch is only consumed when rag_reranker='cross_encoder', rag_mmr_lambda only when rag_use_mmr='true', rag_multi_query_rrf_k only when rag_query_parser='llm', and agent_max_iter / agent_min_stop_conf only when agent_loop='on'. Optuna will sample every axis on every trial; the underlying capability factories ignore irrelevant values, so the per-axis importance from inactive trials is noise and should be discounted in /analyze-study.
